decisions.reason: Liquid Bloom + Temple Step at The Yoga Barn — cacao ceremony into headline live sets, framed as 'produced, intention-held event — not a rave'. Tier-A venue, named lineage, complete fields.
Raio (Rob Weber) — known Ubud sound-medicine facilitator. Blue Moon framing is editorial gold; ceremony anchor at Yoga Barn. ICP-perfect, complete fields.
Friday ecstatic dance at The Yoga Barn — adults-only, ceremonial container language, named structure (warm-up → peak → integration). Tier-A venue, complete fields.
Vibración~ Thursdays at Paradiso — one of Bali's longest-running ecstatic dance floors. Tier-A venue, named container rules (no phones/shoes/talking), complete fields.

Somatic dance at Dragonfly Village — open-air rice-field shala, named facilitators (Ritual Beats + Emmalee Bevan), fire circle + steam sauna container. Adds novelty (new venue + new facilitator pair).
